title_cn: 价格调查结束，达成协议向有需要的人捐赠 5300 万枚鸡蛋
summary: California’s attorney general could hardly contain himself when he announced “Eggciting News!”: A trio of US egg producers agreed to donate 53 million eggs to food banks and nonprofits and pay $3.3 million to end a nationwide price-rigging investigation.

summary: Option-income ETFs have become one of the fastest-growing segments of the ETF market, but headline yields often obscure meaningful differences in portfolio construction, risk profile and objectives. In this episode of Inside Active, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, speaks with John Burrello, senior portfolio manager for Invesco’s Global Strategies team, including the Invesco QQQ Income Advantage (QQA), about how investors should evaluate thes

title: Mizuho Partners With Bank of Baroda to Finance India Deals
title_cn: 瑞穗银行与巴罗达银行合作为印度交易提供融资
summary: India’s Bank of Baroda has partnered with Mizuho Bank Ltd., one of Japan’s largest lenders, to jointly fund mergers and acquisitions, signaling expectations that deal activity will accelerate in the world’s fastest-growing large economy.

title: Europe Startups in Search of Cash Opt for SPAC Route
title_cn: 寻找现金的欧洲初创公司选择SPAC路线
summary: Nine European startups have announced plans to merge with US blank check firms this year.

title: Stocks Hover, Best Quarter Since 2020, Indirect US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 美伊间接谈判，股市徘徊，创 2020 年以来最佳季度表现
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Britain’s Big Plans for Small Ships
title_cn: 英国小型船舶的宏伟计划
summary: The UK’s future large, advanced destroyers ran aground on the shores of fiscal austerity. Instead, the Royal Navy will get a bunch of domestically made smaller vessels and network them with drones.

title: Deutsche Bank Sells India Units to Kotak for $30 Million
title_cn: 德意志银行以 3000 万美元将印度业务出售给 Kotak
summary: Deutsche Bank AG agreed to sell its Indian consumer banking and wealth businesses to Kotak Mahindra Bank for around 2.82 billion rupees ($30 million), joining a slew of US and European lenders exiting the crowded segment as local players step up.

title: Chip Stocks Put Up Their Best Quarter Ever With Some Wild Swings
title_cn: 芯片股经历了有史以来最好的季度波动
summary: Chip stocks posted their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go.

title: Nike Posts Earnings That Surpass Expectations in Latest Quarter
title_cn: 耐克公布最新季度盈利超出预期
summary: Nike Inc. reported better-than-expected results last quarter, a sign that Chief Executive Officer Elliott Hill’s turnaround efforts are gaining some traction.

title: S&P 500 Climbs at End of Best Quarter Since 2020: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数在 2020 年以来最好季度末攀升：市场总结
summary: The best quarter in six years for stocks ended on a positive note, with chipmakers extending their surge from war-driven lows and signs of economic resilience fueling optimism about corporate earnings.

title: US Stocks Gain as S&P 500, Nasdaq Notch Best Quarter Since 2020
title_cn: 美股上涨，标普 500 指数、纳斯达克指数创 2020 年以来最佳季度表现
summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes notched their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data.

title: Rising Inflation Is Squeezing the South
title_cn: 通胀上升正在挤压南方
summary: The "Southern squeeze" is affecting the South, where the cost of living is rising and overall wages are failing to keep pace, with median household income in the South being about $76,000, well below the national average. This is forcing residents and businesses to make tough decisions. Brett Pulley reports for us from Atlanta.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Sanctions Mexican Companies for Cartel-Linked Fuel Smuggling
title_cn: 美国制裁与卡特尔相关的燃料走私墨西哥公司
summary: The US Treasury announced sanctions against two Mexican citizens and nine companies in the country that the agency said are linked to a fuel-smuggling scheme with ties to a cartel.

title: Tungsten Can Deter China’s Military Dominance
title_cn: 钨可以威慑中国的军事主导地位
summary: Around 80% of the world’s tungsten, used in bullets and armor plating, is produced by China. Bloomberg Opinion columnist David Fickling went to a remote mine in Australia to learn why that’s about to change. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasury Market’s June Rally Bails Out Quarter and First Half
title_cn: 国债市场六月份的反弹缓解了季度和上半年的情况
summary: US Treasuries were set to finish June with a modest gain thanks to a collapse in inflation expectations, ending the market’s performance drought over the first five months of the year.

title: The Lower Income Consumer Has Felt Inflation The Most Says Suzuki
title_cn: 铃木表示，低收入消费者对通货膨胀的感受最深
summary:
The best quarter in six years for stocks is ending on a positive note, with chipmakers extending their surge from war-driven lows and signs of economic resilience fueling optimism about corporate earnings.
A rally that’s added over $8 trillion to the S&P 500’s value in three months powered ahead as data signaled strength in both jobs and consumer sentiment. Dan Suzuki, Global Investment Strategist at iCapital joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls as Traders Weigh Middle East Return, Supply Glut Risks
title_cn: 交易员权衡中东回报和供应过剩风险，油价下跌
summary: Oil declined with shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz picking up amid hopes for a permanent US-Iran peace deal and new warnings of a near-term glut.

title: Domicile Isn't a Real Argument For Citizenship Says Wydra
title_cn: 维德拉表示，住所并不是公民身份的真正依据
summary: A divided US Supreme Court upheld the constitutional right of birthright citizenship, rejecting President Donald Trump’s planned restrictions and invalidating a central plank of his immigration agenda. Justices Clarence Thomas, Samuel Alito and Neil Gorsuch dissented. "National citizenship was not an independent concept but simply derivative of state citizenship. “Every citizen of a state,” it was often said, was “ipso facto a citizen of the United States.” In these contexts, too, national citizenship required domicile because state citizenship required domicile." Justice Thomas wrote. Elizabeth Wydra, President of the Constitutional Accountability Center joined Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Climbs as Traders Eye Hormuz and Fed Rate Outlook
title_cn: 交易商关注霍尔木兹海峡和美联储利率前景，铜价上涨
summary: Copper climbed as as traders awaited fresh peace talks between the US and Iran and clues on the outlook for US monetary policy.

title: China Opportunity: Where Global Capital Moves Next
title_cn: 中国机遇：全球资本下一步流向
summary: Brian Roberts, Head of Equities Product Development, Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing Ltd. told Bloomberg's Charlotte Yang how Hong Kong powers northbound flows. While on our panel Mark Konyn, Group Chief Investment Officer, AIA; Jeff Li, Chief Investment Officer, E Fund HK and Helen Qiao, Chief Greater China Economist & Head of Asia Economics Research, Bank of America shared their optimism for global investment in China with Bloomberg's Rebecca Sin at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Colombia Raises Interest Rate to 12% After Court Ends Crisis
title_cn: 法院结束危机后哥伦比亚将利率提高至 12%
summary: Colombia restarted interest rate rises after a court stripped the government of its power to block monetary tightening and the presidential election eased fears over central bank independence.

title: Oil Falls as Traders Weigh Middle East Return, Supply Glut Risks
title_cn: 交易员权衡中东回报和供应过剩风险，油价下跌
summary: Oil declined, with shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz picking up on hopes for a permanent US-Iran deal and a Wall Street bank issuing fresh warnings about a potential glut. Michelle Brouhard  Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk at Kpler joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Dolenc Sees No Urgency to Hike If Energy Markets Stay Calm
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长多伦茨认为，如果能源市场保持平静，就没有加息的紧迫性
summary: The European Central Bank may be able to keep interest rates unchanged at its next meeting if the situation in the Middle East doesn’t escalate in the meantime, according to Governing Council member Primoz Dolenc.

title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
title_cn: 萨斯奎哈纳称其因神秘内幕交易者损失了数百万美元
summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.

title: Chips Lead a Stock Rally | Open Interest 6/30/2026
title_cn: 筹码引领股市上涨|未平仓合约 6/30/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks are on pace for their best quarter in six years as chipmakers power the rally. The yen sinks to a four-decade low, oil heads for a quarterly drop, and we break down the latest Supreme Court rulings reshaping politics and immigration. Plus, Silas Brown on why sovereign wealth funds are pouring into private credit, and Nishant Kumar on Millennium’s billion-dollar bet on a new quant hedge fund. NOTE: National Public Radio issued a correction and retracted the story on Justice Alito. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Slides Below $60,000 as Strategy Selloff Refuels Anxiety
title_cn: 策略抛售加剧焦虑，比特币跌破 60,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin tumbled more than 3% toward $58,000 on Tuesday as investors reversed an initial vote of confidence in Michael Saylor’s financing overhaul at Strategy Inc., raising fresh concerns that one of the cryptocurrency’s biggest buyers may no longer be a consistent source of demand.

title: Sable Sinks 55% as Oil Driller Struggles to Repay Exxon Loan
title_cn: 由于石油钻探公司难以偿还埃克森美孚贷款，Sable 股价下跌 55%
summary: Sable Offshore Corp., briefly buoyed by a Trump administration push to boost oil production off the California coast, lost roughly half its market value after it turned to equity and bond investors to repay debt owed to Exxon Mobil Corp.

title: ECB’s Rehn Says Energy Shock Has Been ‘Clearly Stagflationary’
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长雷恩表示能源冲击“明显是滞胀”
summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Olli Rehn said the conflict in the Middle East is stoking inflation while weighing on economic expansion. Rehn spoke with Francine Lacqua on Tuesday in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nike to Report With China, Tariff Refunds in Focus
title_cn: 耐克将向中国报告，关税退款成为焦点
summary: Poonam Goyal of Bloomberg Intelligence joins Bloomberg's Paul Sweeney and Alexis Christoforous to preview Nike earnings. Nike investors will look for further signs of progress in the company’s comeback effort as Chief Executive Officer Elliott Hill cements a leadership reset. Traders will also seek details about one-time tariff refunds and demand tied to the FIFA World Cup.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Erroneous Trades Force DTCC to Take a Rare Double-Settlement Day
title_cn: 错误交易迫使 DTCC 采取罕见的双重结算日
summary: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corp., which settles most trades of US securities, said it will complete two days worth of transactions on Tuesday after a significant number of erroneous trades were submitted by a member firm.

title: Arabica Sees Largest Gain Since 2022 as Brazil Supply Risks Rise
title_cn: 随着巴西供应风险上升，阿拉比卡咖啡实现 2022 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Arabica coffee jumped the most in almost four years, buoyed by mounting concerns about supply in top-grower Brazil.

title: UK ‘Minded to Intervene’ in Paramount’s Warner Bros. Deal Over Media Ownership Concerns
title_cn: 英国因媒体所有权问题“有意干预”派拉蒙与华纳兄弟的交易
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. could face an intervention from the UK government after the country’s culture and media secretary raised concerns over the diversity of media ownership.

title: Gold Edges Above $4,000 as Traders Eye Fed Outlook, Iran Talks
title_cn: 交易员关注美联储前景和伊朗谈判，金价突破 4,000 美元
summary: Gold edged above $4,000 an ounce, as traders weighed the outlook for US monetary policy following a fresh slew of economic data.

title: European Stocks Cap Best Quarter Since 2020 With Record High
title_cn: 欧洲股市创下 2020 年以来最佳季度纪录新高
summary: European stocks advanced on Tuesday, closing at a record high as a revival of the AI trade added momentum to a rally that has delivered the best quarter since late 2020.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 6/30/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBI Funding Curbs Deal ‘Body Blow’ to Indian Prop Trading Firms
title_cn: 印度储备银行资金限制对印度自营交易公司的交易“沉重打击”
summary: India’s proprietary trading firms and stock brokers are bracing for a major overhaul of how they finance trading activity.

title: BDC Veteran Tannenbaum Plans Comeback to Industry Near ‘Crisis’
title_cn: BDC 资深人士 Tannenbaum 计划在“危机”临近时重返行业
summary: Len Tannenbaum, who sold his $5 billion credit firm to distressed debt pioneer Oaktree almost a decade ago, is looking to raise a new fund to capitalize on turmoil in the $1.8 trillion private credit market.

title: Don't See Slowdown in Institutional Client Interest: Markova
title_cn: 马尔科瓦：机构客户兴趣并未放缓
summary: Dea Markova, policy director at Fireblocks, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the expected updated draft to the Clarity Act that may be released soon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Crypto Bill Draft Expected Soon
title_cn: 新的加密货币法案草案预计即将推出
summary: Bloomberg Intelligences Nathan Dean joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." One of the Republican senators spearheading efforts to pass an industry-backed measure to regulate cryptocurrency and digital assets said Thursday lawmakers plan to soon release an “updated draft” of the bill that seeks to address members’ concerns over ethics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court to Hear Apple Appeal Over Contempt Ruling
title_cn: 最高法院将听取苹果公司对藐视法庭裁决的上诉
summary: The Supreme Court agreed to hear an appeal by Apple Inc. regarding a contempt ruling in its long-running antitrust battle with Fortnite-maker Epic Games Inc.

title: Bitcoin Miners Valuable Asset for Electric Grid: Vera
title_cn: 比特币矿工对电网的宝贵资产：维拉
summary: Ethan Vera, COO of Luxor Technology, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Many miners are shifting their focus to AI. More broadly, crypto firms are beginning to apply the infrastructure and market expertise they built around digital assets to AI, from converting mining sites into data centers to building markets for GPUs and computing power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitget CEO Discusses Tokenization, Market-Making
title_cn: Bitget首席执行官讨论代币化和做市
summary: Gracy Chen, CEO of Bitget, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Securitize Set to Go Public Thursday
title_cn: 证券化将于周四上市
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Securitize debuts on the New York Stock Exchange this Thursday after investors approved its SPAC merger, which will make it one of the first publicly traded pure-play tokenization companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Cuts Starlink Internet Prices in Memphis After Data Center Opposition
title_cn: 因数据中心反对，SpaceX 降低孟菲斯星链互联网价格
summary: SpaceX is offering discounts for Starlink internet plans in Memphis, Tennessee, as the Elon Musk-led company endures blowback and legal challenges from opponents of its data centers in the area and neighboring Mississippi.

title: Anthropic Releases Claude Science for Automating Research
title_cn: Anthropic 发布 Claude Science 用于自动化研究
summary: Anthropic PBC is releasing new software aimed at helping scientists automate research, in the hopes of reducing some of the tedious aspects of their work.

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Sets Stage for More Media, Cable Deals
title_cn: 康卡斯特分拆 NBC 为更多媒体和有线电视交易奠定了基础
summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

title: High Interest in Perpetual Futures: Kalshi's DeNault
title_cn: 对永续合约的高度兴趣：Kalshi 的 DeNault
summary: Robert DeNault, head of enforcement at Kalshi, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Last month the CFTC permitted the listing of perpetual futures on US exchanges. Kalshi’s contracts were the first perpetual futures approved by the CFTC, marking an expansion beyond the company’s core business of listing event contracts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin ETFs on Track for Record Monthly Outflow
title_cn: 比特币 ETF 月度流出量有望创历史新高
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's James Seyffart joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin’s biggest institutional sources of demand are faltering at the same time, leaving the cryptocurrency increasingly exposed as ETF investors pull money at a record pace and questions persist over the financing playbook behind its largest corporate buyer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saylor's Strategy May Sell Up to $1.25 Billion of Bitcoin
title_cn: Saylor 的策略可能会出售高达 12.5 亿美元的比特币
summary: Bloomberg's Monique Mulima joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Michael Saylor’s Strategy unveiled a sweeping overhaul of the financing model underpinning its Bitcoin strategy, giving itself broader powers to sell the cryptocurrency, buy back securities and preserve liquidity as it adapts to mounting pressure on the structure that fueled years of aggressive accumulation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubenstein Doesn't See the AI Stock Bubble Bursting
title_cn: 鲁宾斯坦没有看到人工智能股票泡沫破裂
summary: David Rubenstein, the founder and co-chairman of the Carlyle Group and host of "Bloomberg Wealth," says he doesn't expect the AI bubble to pop anytime soon. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TikTok Finalizing Settlement of Addiction Lawsuit to Avoid Trial
title_cn: TikTok 完成成瘾诉讼的和解以避免审判
summary: TikTok is finalizing a settlement related to a lawsuit claiming that the world’s largest social media platforms are addictive to minors, according to people familiar with the matter, avoiding a jury trial scheduled for July in Los Angeles.

title: Amazon to Pay $2.25 Million to End US Case Over ID Theft
title_cn: 亚马逊将支付 225 万美元结束美国身份盗窃案
summary: Amazon.com Inc. agreed to pay $2.25 million to settle US claims that it routinely failed to provide records to help customers who were victims of identity theft.

title: How US Immigration Rules Are Inciting a Tech Brain Drain
title_cn: 美国移民规则如何引发科技人才流失
summary: The Supreme Court officially struck down President Trump's signature restrictions on birthright citizenship, with implications for the future of the US tech workforce, which relies heavily on immigrant talent. Hiba Anver, partner with Erickson Immigration Group, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aspiring Nvidia Rival Gets Backing From Jane Street
title_cn: 有抱负的 Nvidia 竞争对手得到了 Jane Street 的支持
summary: Startup Etched is emerging from stealth with an eye towards taking on chip heavyweight Nvidia, as the industry shifts from training AI models to running them. The company has raised $800 million in funding including backing from Jane Street and TSMC-linked firm Venture Tech Alliance. Etched CEO Gavin Uberti sits down with Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billion-Dollar Mix-Up Costs Korean Investors a Shot at SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 数十亿美元的混淆让韩国投资者失去了 SpaceX IPO 的机会
summary: A billion-dollar misunderstanding has left Korean investors empty-handed in the blockbuster SpaceX IPO. Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" with the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks on Track for Best Quarter Ever | Bloomberg Tech 6/30/2026
title_cn: 芯片股有望迎来有史以来最好的季度业绩彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down what's behind the chip stock rally, with the sector heading toward its best quarter ever. Plus, Taiwan raids the offices of Super Micro as part of an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia chips into China. And, how a billion-dollar misunderstanding has left Korean investors empty-handed in the blockbuster SpaceX IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ASML, Chip-Tool Stocks Soar as Samsung, SK Plan Investments
title_cn: 三星、SK 计划投资 ASML、芯片工具股飙升
summary: Shares of companies that supply semiconductor equipment are soaring this week as increased investments from leading chipmakers in South Korea bolster investors’ optimism.

title: Schneider to Buy Industrial AI Firm Cognite for $3.1 Billion
title_cn: 施耐德以 31 亿美元收购工业人工智能公司 Cognite
summary: Schneider Electric SE agreed to buy Cognite in a $3.1 billion all-cash deal to expand its industrial data and AI software business.

title: Kalshi Picks Up World Cup Sponsorship Deal at a Deep Discount
title_cn: 卡尔希以大幅折扣获得世界杯赞助协议
summary: When the World Cup knockout round began Sunday, Kalshi joined the likes of Coca-Cola, Visa and Adidas with sideline advertising in the stadiums — an unusual addition, given that the event is halfway over, and also that FIFA already signed up an “official prediction markets partner” in ADI Predictstreet, a startup with ties to the Abu Dhabi royal family.

title: AI Won’t Be Substitute for Human Workers, OpenAI Economist Says
title_cn: OpenAI 经济学家表示，人工智能不会取代人类工人
summary: The rise of artificial intelligence won’t make human workers superfluous, according to OpenAI Chief Economist Ronnie Chatterji.

title: Sovereign Funds Back Private Credit
title_cn: 主权基金支持私人信贷
summary: Institutional investors are doubling down on private credit even as retail investors grow more cautious. Bloomberg's Silas Brown joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why sovereign wealth funds continue shifting into private markets, how fundraising is separating industry leaders from the rest, and why AI is emerging as the next major opportunity for private equity and private credit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Gives AI Product Oversight to CEO and COO in Reshuffle
title_cn: SAP在重组中将人工智能产品监督权交给首席执行官和首席运营官
summary: SAP SE is divvying up responsibilities for its product and engineering functions in its second top-level reorganization this year, people familiar with the matter said, as Europe’s largest software company grapples with staying ahead of rising artificial intelligence competition.

title: Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong 2026 Highlights
title_cn: 彭博投资香港 2026 年亮点
summary: From market outlook and cross-border flows to private capital, IPO momentum, China opportunities and AI infrastructure, Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong 2026 convened allocators, dealmakers and investors for conversations on the forces shaping Asia’s markets.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spain's War on Football Piracy Knocks Legitimate Sites Offline
title_cn: 西班牙打击足球盗版的战争导致合法网站下线
summary: From small businesses to government agencies, legitimate websites are getting caught in the crossfire of LaLiga's fight against illegal sports streams

title: Call Center Stocks Fall on Fear AI Makes Them ‘Uninvestible’
title_cn: 呼叫中心股票因恐惧人工智能而下跌，使它们“不可投资”
summary: Signs that companies are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence to handle customer service tasks has triggered a fresh selloff in shares of two call-center companies.

title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Gets 30 Years in Prison for Billion-Dollar Fraud
title_cn: 流亡中国大亨因数十亿美元欺诈被判入狱 30 年
summary: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo, who promoted himself as a crusader against the communist government in Beijing, was ordered to spend 30 years in a US prison for duping investors out of $1 billion.

title: AI Chip Startup Etched Lures Jane Street, TSMC-Linked VC as Investors
title_cn: AI 芯片初创公司 Etched 吸引 Jane Street 和台积电相关风险投资公司作为投资者
summary: Nvidia rival says it has raised $800 million and has $1 billion in contracts.

title: Trump Wins Big, Loses Big in Supreme Court Rulings
title_cn: 特朗普在最高法院的裁决中大赢大输
summary: The president’s immigration agenda suffers a setback, but Republican midterm candidates get a boost.

title: Witkoff, Kushner to Hold Indirect Talks With Iran
title_cn: 威特科夫、库什纳将与伊朗举行间接会谈
summary: Qatar said Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had arrived in Doha as part of ongoing peace negotiations between the US and Iran. Qatari officials say they won't meet directly with the Iranians. Jeff Mason reports from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Treasury Secretary Lew on Iran Talks, US-Israel Relations
title_cn: 前财政部长卢谈伊朗会谈、美以关系
summary: Jack Lew, former US Treasury Secretary and former US ambassador to Israel, says economic sanctions on Iran can be effective but need to be used with care. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Lew also comments on the US dollar and the Israel-Lebanon pact. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CIA Aims to Speed Up Tech Adoption as AI Is ‘Rewriting’ Conflict
title_cn: 人工智能正在“改写”冲突，中央情报局旨在加快技术采用
summary: CIA Director John Ratcliffe vowed to step up the agency’s efforts to deploy artificial intelligence and quantum computing, stressing that rapid developments in emerging technologies are changing the nature of geopolitics.

title: Venezuela Quake Death Toll Nears 2,000; Machado Stuck in Panama
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数接近2000人；马查多被困巴拿马
summary: The death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela last week rose to nearly 2,000, as aftershocks eased in both frequency and intensity and authorities expanded recovery efforts.

title: Stocks See Best Quarter Since 2020 As Chips Soar | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/30/2026
title_cn: 随着筹码飙升，股市迎来 2020 年以来最好的季度彭博商业周刊日报 6/30/2026
summary: Today, June Grasso, Bloomberg legal analyst and host of 'Bloomberg Law,' discusses the Supreme Court's decision to uphold birthright citizenship in the United States. Then, Bloomberg's Ian King dives into semiconductor rally as chips send stocks to their best quarter in six years. Plus, Dan Suzuki, global investment strategist at iCapital, said that market tailwinds are in the rearview and that he expects inflation is at or near its peak and will soon come back down. Finally, Brett Pulley, Bloomberg News Atlanta bureau chief, breaks down why costs are rising in the American South and how communities are feeling squeezed financially as a result. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Backs Birthright Citizenship in Blow to Trump
title_cn: 最高法院支持出生公民权，对特朗普构成打击
summary: The US Supreme Court rejected a central plank of President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda on Tuesday, deeming his plan to restrict birthright citizenship to be unconstitutional.

title: Emergency Ordered for Largest US Power Grid as Record Heat Nears
title_cn: 创纪录高温临近，美国最大电网紧急订购
summary: The Trump administration has declared a power emergency for the nation’s largest energy grid in advance of a dangerous heat wave that threatens to strain electricity infrastructure.

title: Anti-Migrant Protests Draw Thousands Across South Africa
title_cn: 南非各地数千人举行反移民抗议活动
summary: Thousands of people joined anti-migrant protests in South Africa on Tuesday, watched over by a massive police contingent that was deployed to prevent violence and intimidation.

title: NJ’s Kean Says He Was Treated for Depression During Absence
title_cn: 新泽西州的基恩说他在缺席期间接受了抑郁症治疗
summary: New Jersey Representative Tom Kean Jr. revealed that he has been treated for depression as he returned to the US House to vote for the first time in nearly four months.

title: High Court Backs Birthright Citizenship | Balance of Power 6/30/2026
title_cn: 高等法院支持出生公民权|权力平衡 6/30/2026
summary:
On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the end of the Supreme Court's latest term. On today's show, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Maywood Strategies Founder Doug Farrar, former FTC Commissioner Rebecca Slaughter and Kpler Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk Michelle Brouhard.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How a Trump-Championed Voter ID Bill Would Change US Elections
title_cn: 特朗普支持的选民身份法案将如何改变美国选举
summary: President Donald Trump and his staunchest congressional allies have threatened a legislative blockade over a contentious voter identification law that would significantly reshape how Americans vote in November.

title: Trump Fight for Voter ID Law Stalls Defense Bill in US House
title_cn: 特朗普争取选民身份法在美国众议院搁置国防法案
summary: President Donald Trump’s demand for new voter identification requirements on Tuesday sidelined a planned congressional vote on a $1.15 trillion annual defense policy bill his administration is seeking.

title: Carney Concedes Canada Will Overshoot Emissions Forecasts
title_cn: 卡尼承认加拿大将超出排放预测
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Canada’s emissions will be higher in the coming years than previously projected, his clearest admission yet that the country’s near-term climate targets are likely out of reach.

title: The Bad News About the Birthright Ruling
title_cn: 关于出生权裁决的坏消息
summary: The Supreme Court ruled correctly on birthright citizenship, but the vote revealed an outrageous conclusion from the dissenting justices, says Harvard Law Professor and Bloomberg Opinion columnist Noah Feldman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Slaughter Calls Supreme Court Presidential Power Ruling 'Disturbing'
title_cn: 斯劳特称最高法院总统权力裁决“令人不安”
summary: Former FTC Commissioner Rebecca Slaughter says the US Supreme Court's decision to expand President Donald Trump's power to fire top government officials is "disturbing" and a "massive transfer of power from Congress to the President." She speaks on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Supreme Court Upholds Birthright Citizenship
title_cn: 美国最高法院维持出生公民权
summary: A divided Supreme Court rejected President Donald Trump’s planned restrictions on birthright citizenship, invalidating a central plank of his immigration agenda. Tyler Kendall explains (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Defense Plan Leaves £5 Billion Hole in Burnham’s First Budget
title_cn: 英国国防计划在伯纳姆的第一份预算中留下了 50 亿英镑的缺口
summary: The UK’s long-awaited Defense Investment Plan leaves several hard choices for Andy Burnham to make if he becomes prime minister, including how to close an almost £5 billion ($6.6 billion) hole in his first budget.

title: Supreme Court Voids Political-Party Spending Caps in GOP Win
title_cn: 最高法院在共和党获胜后废除政党支出上限
summary: The US Supreme Court threw out longstanding federal limits on spending by political parties in coordination with candidates, in a ruling likely to help Republicans in the November midterms.

title: Supreme Court Opens Midterm Ad Floodgates, Giving GOP an Edge
title_cn: 最高法院打开中期广告闸门，为共和党带来优势
summary: The Supreme Court has given political parties more advertising bang for their buck – and opened the floodgates to a gusher of midterm campaign commercials – with a Tuesday decision that strikes down an obscure provision of federal election law.

title: Spain Set to Hand Papers to Over 1 Million Undocumented Migrants
title_cn: 西班牙将向超过100万无证移民递交证件
summary: The Spanish government is set to grant residency permits to more than 1 million undocumented migrants, double the number that was projected when a mass regularization program was announced in April, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Corruption Scandals Push Milei Toward Argentina Establishment He Vilified
title_cn: 腐败丑闻将米雷推向他所诽谤的阿根廷当权派
summary: President Javier Milei rode to power vowing to destroy the Argentine political elite he derided as “the caste.” Now, after a string of corruption scandals, he’s turning to one of its most recognizable figures to run his cabinet.

title: Lebanon-Israel Pact Fragile After Hezbollah Vows to Derail
title_cn: 真主党誓言脱轨后黎巴嫩-以色列条约脆弱
summary: Israel and Lebanon’s latest peace deal faces an uncertain future after Hezbollah, Iran’s most powerful proxy militant group, this week vowed to derail its implementation.

title: Supreme Court Will Consider Right to Own ‘Assault Weapons’
title_cn: 最高法院将考虑拥有“攻击性武器”的权利
summary: The US Supreme Court agreed to consider whether Americans have a constitutional right to own so-called assault rifles, the popular weapons that have repeatedly been used in mass killings.

title: US Should Push $650 Billion Bump in IMF Firepower, Democrats Say
title_cn: 民主党称美国应向国际货币基金组织增加 6500 亿美元的资金
summary: The US should lead an initiative to expand the International Monetary Fund’s financial capacity by at least $650 billion to help blunt the impact of the Iran war on the global economy, a group of Democratic lawmakers said on Tuesday.

title: GOP Picks Dallas for Trump’s September Midterm Convention
title_cn: 共和党选择达拉斯参加特朗普九月中期代表大会
summary: Republicans will host a midterm convention in Dallas on Sept. 9-10, according to a person familiar with the event President Donald Trump first floated last year as a way of rallying GOP voters.

title: Supreme Court Lets States Ban Trans Athletes in Female Teams
title_cn: 最高法院允许各州禁止女队中的跨性别运动员
summary: A divided US Supreme Court upheld state laws that ban transgender girls and women from competing for their schools on female athletic teams, siding with conservatives and President Donald Trump on a divisive culture war issue.

title: Understanding the Long Fight Over Birthright Citizenship
title_cn: 了解关于出生公民权的长期斗争
summary: In rejecting President Donald Trump’s attempt to end automatic US citizenship for children born to parents who are in the country unlawfully or on temporary visas, the Supreme Court on June 30 upheld more than a century of legal precedent. There have been previous efforts to put restrictions on birthright citizenship dating back to decades after the concept was enshrined in the US Constitution. The Supreme Court has asserted, again, that such attempts can’t be squared with the document’s 14th Am

title: Trump Administration’s Homelessness Funding Rule Struck Down
title_cn: 特朗普政府的无家可归者资助规则被废除
summary: A judge struck down the Trump administration’s changes to a widely used federal housing-assistance program that put at risk more than $3 billion in funds to fight homelessness, ruling the government had failed to consider the impact on families who rely on such help.
